allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d.get\('success'\), '| state:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('credentialExchange',{}\).get\('state'\), '| id:', d.get\('data',{}\).get\('credentialExchange',{}\).get\('id'\), '| has invitationUrl:', bool\(d.get\('data',{}\).get\('invitationUrl'\)\)\)")
